title: pacemaker bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.1.10-1.0.1]
- Replace bug url [Orabug: 34202300]
- Upstream reference in pacemaker crm_report binary [Orabug: 32825154]

[2.1.10-1]
- Rebase on upstream 2.1.10-rc1 release
- Use dbus to detect completion of systemd resource start/stop actions
- Add an option for controlling remote node fencing behavior
- Related: RHEL-89134
- Resolves: RHEL-86143
- Resolves: RHEL-84018
full_text:
[2.1.10-1.0.1]
- Replace bug url [Orabug: 34202300]
- Upstream reference in pacemaker crm_report binary [Orabug: 32825154]

[2.1.10-1]
- Rebase on upstream 2.1.10-rc1 release
- Use dbus to detect completion of systemd resource start/stop actions
- Add an option for controlling remote node fencing behavior
- Related: RHEL-89134
- Resolves: RHEL-86143
- Resolves: RHEL-84018
